text_template: All work product, including drafts and source files, is owned by the client upon {ownership_trigger}.

rewrite_options.description: Transfer IP only after final payment is completed
Grant limited client license until full payment, then transfer ownership
Client owns deliverables but freelancer retains pre-existing tools and templates

link_effect: Narrowing immediate IP transfer can lead to requests for earlier milestone payments.

text_template: Freelancer grants the client a {license_scope} license to portfolio assets used in the deliverables.

rewrite_options.description: Use a non-exclusive perpetual license for embedded portfolio assets
Add optional paid buyout for exclusive rights to portfolio assets

text_template: Project scope includes {deliverable_count} deliverables with up to {feature_count} core features each.

rewrite_options.description: Attach explicit acceptance criteria for each deliverable
Limit each deliverable to 3 core features

link_effect: Narrowing non-compete obligations may prompt broader scope expectations.

text_template: Out-of-scope requests are handled through change orders billed at {change_order_rate} per hour.

rewrite_options.description: Include up to 4 hours of minor change requests without a formal change order
Require written approval within 3 business days for change orders

text_template: Client pays a {deposit_percent}% deposit, then milestone payments every {milestone_days} days.

rewrite_options.description: Set deposit at 30% with milestone billing
Switch to weekly invoicing for work completed
Require payment due within 15 days of invoice

link_effect: Earlier IP transfer often triggers stronger payment timing demands.

text_template: Late invoices accrue {late_interest}% monthly interest after a {grace_days}-day grace period.

rewrite_options.description: Cap late interest at 1.0% monthly
Extend grace period to 15 days

text_template: Confidentiality obligations survive for {nda_years} years, covering all non-public business information.

rewrite_options.description: Set confidentiality period to 3 years
Use 3 years generally, with perpetual protection for trade secrets

text_template: Freelancer may disclose confidential information to subcontractors subject to {subcontractor_condition}.

rewrite_options.description: Require written client approval before any subcontractor disclosure
Allow only named subcontractors bound by equivalent NDAs

text_template: Freelancer may not provide similar services in {restricted_region} for {restriction_months} months after project completion.

rewrite_options.description: Limit non-compete to 6 months in the client's core market
Apply restrictions only to a named list of direct competitors
Use a 12-month regional restriction instead of global

link_effect: If non-compete limits are narrowed, the client may request broader service scope commitments.

text_template: Non-solicitation of client employees applies for {nonsolicit_months} months after termination.

rewrite_options.description: Reduce non-solicitation period to 6 months
Exclude hires from general public job advertisements

text_template: The fee includes up to {included_revisions} revision rounds; additional revisions are billed at {extra_revision_rate} per hour.

rewrite_options.description: Include 3 revision rounds before extra fees
Set additional revision rate at $50 per hour

text_template: Revision requests must be submitted within {revision_window_days} days of delivery.

rewrite_options.description: Set revision request window to 21 days
Pause revision window when client feedback is delayed
